meaning: n.(选区的)选民,(一批)顾客,支持者,赞助者
examples: Unemployment is high in her constituency.
He owns a house in his Darlington constituency.
More research should be done regarding the molecular constituency of food.
Alternatively, it's just possible the Wales Office doesn't realise which constituency its own office is in.
But there other parts of the country that need transport spending as well including my constituency.
